tier2_signals.learner_task: Work through expert interpretation of an enzyme reaction-rate investigation from condition to conclusion.
tier2_signals.expected_output: A continuous walkthrough that transfers findings across stages to a bounded conclusion.
tier2_signals.activity_preamble: Model how an expert reads the evidence set.
tier2_signals.purpose: Model expert interpretation of an enzyme reaction-rate investigation.
tier2_signals.specification: Ordered process walkthrough from condition identification to bounded conclusion.
tier2_signals.body_stand_in: Model expert interpretation of an enzyme reaction-rate investigation.

stages: identify the manipulated condition and measured outcome
connect the pattern to enzyme behaviour

recoverability.method: score = (yes*1 + partially*0.5 + no*0) / N; N = leaf informational units (process_goal + each stage)
